expectedIssues: Top nav button is missing text
reportedIssues: Disclaimer/fine print text at the bottom is truncated and incomplete, cutting off essential legal information. The text appears to end abruptly mid-sentence ('apply. See Promotions page for full T&Cs' is barely visible), making it impossible for users to read full terms and conditions.

The disclaimer/fine print text has an extremely small font size with tight line-height, making it very difficult to read. The contrast may also be insufficient against the yellow background in some areas.

The spacing between the main promotional content and the bottom disclaimer section is minimal, creating a cramped appearance and potentially pushing important legal information out of natural viewing area.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues describe a top nav button missing text; all three issues concern disclaimer/fine print text at the bottom of the screen.
